# OpenDiabetic Foundation

OpenDiabetic Foundation builds privacy-first compute infrastructure for diabetic life.

Canonical site: https://opendiabetic.com
Contact: build@opendiabetic.com
X: https://x.com/opendiabetics
Core strategy brief: https://opendiabetic.com/open-diabetic-core-strategy.md

## Primary message

Privacy-first compute for diabetic life.

## Secondary message

OpenDiabetic gives people living with diabetes a trusted lifestyle OS for records, reminders, care packs, local support, research, and day-to-day simplicity without harvesting their data.

## Core doctrine

OpenDiabetic does not harvest diabetic data. The project is designed around local ownership, local storage, explicit consent, user-controlled records, and privacy-first compute.

## Product concepts

- DiabeticOS: lifestyle operating system for daily reminders, routines, supplies, food, foot care, doctor prep, family updates, emergency sheets, recovery, and reduced cognitive load.
- DiabeticMOS: management operating system for support circles, care packs, local vendors, donation workflows, volunteer support, medical contacts, insurance documents, and privacy permissions.
- LocalDiabetic: local deployment layer for NAS personal vaults, optional edge appliances, Apple Watch/iPhone alerts, local-first records, family permissions, emergency access, and local support networks.

## Medical safety

OpenDiabetic does not provide medical advice, diagnosis, treatment, medication dosing, or emergency triage. Always consult licensed medical professionals and seek emergency care when needed.
